mapper.sql: id, owner_workspace_id, collaborator_workspace_id, target_type, target_id, role_id, allowed_actions, valid_from, valid_until, granted_by, status, revoked_at, revocation_reason, revision
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pdp_collaboration_grant WHERE owner_workspace_id = #{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY valid_until DESC, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_collaboration_grant ( id, owner_workspace_id, collaborator_workspace_id, target_type, target_id, role_id, allowed_actions, valid_from, valid_until, granted_by, status, revoked_at, revocation_reason, revision ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{ownerWorkspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{collaboratorWorkspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{targetType}, #{targetId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{roleId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{allowedActions,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, #{validFrom,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{validUntil,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{grantedBy,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{revokedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{revocationReason}, #{revision} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_collaboration_grant SET allowed_actions = #{allowedActions,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.JsonDocumentTypeHandler}, valid_from = #{validFrom,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, valid_until = #{validUntil,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, revoked_at = #{revokedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, revocation_reason = #{revocationReason}, revision = #{revision} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
